company.name: NovaBank
company.description: A digital-first bank built by fintech veterans to make banking work for people, not the other way around.
milestones: 2020 — Reached 1 million active customers, driven entirely by word of mouth
2022 — Launched business banking; 50,000+ small businesses onboarded within a year
2024 — Expanded to 40+ countries, processing $2B+ in cross-border payments per month

security_and_compliance.deposit_insurance: FDIC insured up to $250,000 per depositor
security_and_compliance.encryption: AES-256 encryption for all data at rest and in transit
security_and_compliance.authentication: Biometric authentication (Face ID, Touch ID, fingerprint) with multi-factor authentication
security_and_compliance.fraud_protection: Real-time transaction monitoring and fraud detection
certifications: PCI-DSS Level 1 — Payment card industry security standard
SOC 2 Type II — Independently audited security controls
GDPR Compliant — Full compliance with data privacy regulations

platform_features.name: Instant Transfers
platform_features.description: Send and receive money in seconds, 24/7, with no delays or hidden fees.

platform_features.name: Virtual Cards
platform_features.description: Generate one-time or recurring virtual cards for safe online shopping.

platform_features.name: Saving Goals
platform_features.description: Set savings targets, track progress, and automate round-ups toward what matters most.

platform_features.name: Smart Budgeting
platform_features.description: AI-powered spending insights that automatically categorize transactions.

platform_features.name: Global Access
platform_features.description: Spend in 150+ currencies with no foreign transaction fees anywhere on Earth.

platform_features.name: Instant Card Freeze
platform_features.description: Instantly freeze or unfreeze your card from the app to prevent unauthorized transactions.

platform_features.name: Spending Limits
platform_features.description: Set daily, weekly, or monthly spending limits on your card.

platform_features.name: Apple Pay & Google Pay
platform_features.description: Pay with your phone using Apple Pay or Google Pay wherever mobile payments are accepted.

requirements: Personal information (name, address, date of birth)
Social Security number for identity verification
account_opening.upgrade_downgrade: Available at any time with no lock-in periods, via dashboard or customer support

fees.atm_out_of_network: $2 fee (reimbursed up to 4 times/month for Premium account holders)

faqs.question: Are there any fees I should know about?
faqs.answer: No hidden fees. NovaBank offers transparent pricing with no monthly maintenance fees, no overdraft fees, and free ATM access at 55,000+ locations. Out-of-network ATM withdrawals cost $2, but Premium account holders are reimbursed up to 4 times per month.

faqs.question: How do I open an account?
faqs.answer: Click 'Open Account' on the website, fill in your personal information (name, address, date of birth, Social Security number), and submit. Once approved, your debit card arrives in 5–7 business days.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my account?
faqs.answer: Yes, at any time through your dashboard or by contacting support. There are no lock-in periods.

faqs.question: Is my money safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. Deposits are FDIC insured up to $250,000. All data is protected with AES-256 encryption and accounts support biometric and multi-factor authentication.

faqs.question: Does NovaBank operate internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes. NovaBank is available in 40+ countries and supports spending in 150+ currencies with no foreign transaction fees.

faqs.question: How do I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: Email support@novabank.com — the team is available 24/7.
